verdicts.description: Align the Z-axis rods vertically in the frame holders.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker inserts both Z-axis rods into frame holders with rods visibly vertical.
verdicts.reasoning: Both Z-axis rods inserted and visually vertical at 00:00:45.

verdicts.description: Slide the Z-axis carriages onto the rods from the top.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker slides both carriages onto rods from above with smooth motion.

verdicts.description: Hand-tighten the lower rod clamps to hold rods in place.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker hand-tightens lower clamps on both rods before using any tools.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker hand-tightens both lower clamps correctly at 00:01:55.

verdicts.description: Torque all Z-axis frame bolts to 2.5 Nm using a calibrated torque wrench.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker uses a calibrated torque wrench to tighten all Z-axis frame bolts to 2.5 Nm.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker uses a standard hex wrench instead of a calibrated torque wrench at 00:02:20. The required 2.5 Nm torque value cannot be verified or achieved without a torque wrench.

verdicts.description: Attach the Z-axis motor mounts to the bottom frame.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker secures motor mounts to the bottom frame with all specified screws.

verdicts.description: Mount the stepper motors onto the motor mounts and connect cables.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker mounts both stepper motors and connects motor cables securely.
verdicts.reasoning: Both stepper motors mounted and cables connected at 00:04:15.

verdicts.description: Run the Z-axis self-calibration routine for a minimum of 90 seconds before sign-off.
verdicts.compliance_criterion: Worker initiates calibration routine and waits the full 90 seconds before stopping it.
verdicts.reasoning: Worker starts the calibration routine at 00:04:55 but terminates it at 00:05:29 — only 34 seconds into the required 90-second routine.
